title: AN ACT CREATING BARRIOS IN CERTAIN MUNICIPALITIES OF THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO

chunks.text:
H. No. 2775 / 55 OG No. 40, 8440 (October 5, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2589, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIOS IN CERTAIN MUNICIPALITIES OF THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:
The sitios of Canhawan Norte and Pacu Sur in the barrio of Igdarapdap, and the sitios of Canhawan Sur, Casling and Odiongan in the barrio of Cabalagnan to be known as the barrio of Canhawan.
